name: Defined Term
description: A term given an express meaning in the agreement using a recognized definitional pattern (e.g. 'shall mean', 'is defined as'), rather than left to inference from context.

name: Alias Resolution
description: Contract language that resolves a synonym or shorthand label (e.g. 'collectively referred to as') to a single canonical defined term.

name: Defined-Term Reference
description: Contract language that relies on a term as though it were already defined (e.g. 'as defined herein', 'as defined above'), signaling reliance on a definition that must exist elsewhere in the document.
